title: Talks about forming a new Latvian government to continue on Saturday
summary_full: President Edgars Rinkēvičs has a working weekend ahead of him with talks set to continue at Rīga Castle over the necessity of installing a new government, following the resignation of Prime Minister Evika Siliņa and the collapse of the three-party coalition on Thursday.
